desc: Keyboard parts are originally for harpsichord. Highly accessible to Level 3 players with reasonable preparation.
The foundational era of classical piano trios. Mostly playable by Level 3 players with structured sight-reading studies.
Complex, dense keyboard writeups where the pianist plays a dominant, virtuosic role. Requires thorough rehearsals.
Varying, highly stylized challenges. Demands advanced stylistic awareness, rhythm controls, and prior study.
